title: Neopian Omelettes
description: Adds a unique new Food variety, Powerful 3-Bite Omelettes!
body:
Neopian Omelettes adds a unique new Food variety, 3-Bite Omelettes!

![OmeleteLineup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a278eb800c5c24bd5b4345fb8e40a9cd765bd1.png) ~~~  ![OmeletteStages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034f45657661477a1b384f290dee3efd4813f7c5.png)

Inspired by the Omelettes of Neopets, These can be made with a wide variety of ingredients and all give unique effects when eaten!

![Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/NsFaJSs.gif)

It is crafted using 3 eggs, plus a variety of fillings that will give the omelettes special abilities! Meats will rapidly regenerate some of your health in addition to it's saturation, fish will give luck for fishing, chorus fruits will give levitation - followed by slow falling, etc.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d982e1c05a600c6642d29c4e1a86a134e5a22b53.png)

The goal was to make an unstackable food that was worth carrying around. Omelettes act a bit like a microstack of food, and double as pseudo potions in a way. A meat filled omelette can't be stacked like Steak, but each bite will provide you with rapid regeneration in addition to saturation, making it a better option in dire situations.
